subcodes.first_line: The perfumed fragrances wafted from the celestial and glorious paradise, and the musk-laden breezes of the divine and heavenly concourse rest upon thy resplendent resting-place and thy renowned shrine
subcodes.first_line_orig: النفحات المعطره التی نفحت من ریاض الملکوت الابهی و النسمات المعنبره التی تهب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @visitation Tablets, @praise and encouragement
